title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
title_es: AMIE de Google iguala a médicos en gestión de enfermedades
bajada: Un estudio en Nature demuestra que el sistema de IA conversacional de Google coincide con médicos de atención primaria en la gestión compleja de enfermedades. Este avance sugiere que los sistemas de IA podrían complementar significativamente la práctica médica.
bajada_en: A Nature study shows Google's conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management. This breakthrough suggests AI systems could significantly complement medical practice.

title: Fastest, Largest, Strongest: NVIDIA Blackwell Sweeps MLPerf Training 6.0
summary: Every breakthrough AI model starts the same way: with a training run. The infrastructure running those training jobs shapes everything: how fast teams can iterate, what scale of model they can build and whether those jobs complete reliably.  As models grow in size, complexity and intelligence, the demands on training infrastructure are also rising.  In […]
bajada: La arquitectura Blackwell de NVIDIA barrió las pruebas de entrenamiento de MLPerf 6.0 con el mayor rendimiento hasta ahora. Estos resultados confirman que Blackwell es la infraestructura preferida para entrenar modelos de IA a gran escala.
bajada_en: NVIDIA's Blackwell architecture swept MLPerf Training 6.0 benchmarks with record-breaking performance. These results confirm Blackwell as the preferred infrastructure for training large-scale AI models.

title: Hands Free, AIs Forward: NVIDIA XR AI Brings Agents to AR Glasses
summary: NVIDIA XR AI is now available in public beta, giving developers a framework for building multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices.
title_es: NVIDIA XR AI en beta pública para agentes en gafas AR
bajada: NVIDIA lanzó XR AI en beta pública, un framework que permite a developers construir agentes IA multimodales para gafas AR y dispositivos XR. Esta herramienta abre nuevas posibilidades para aplicaciones de realidad extendida.
bajada_en: NVIDIA launched XR AI in public beta, a framework enabling developers to build multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices. This tool opens new possibilities for extended reality applications.

title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
title_es: GLM-5.2: modelo optimizado para tareas de largo horizonte
bajada: Hugging Face presenta GLM-5.2, un nuevo modelo diseñado específicamente para tareas que requieren razonamiento y planificación extendidos. La mejora en capacidades de horizonte largo lo hace relevante para aplicaciones empresariales complejas.
bajada_en: Hugging Face introduces GLM-5.2, a new model designed specifically for long-horizon reasoning and planning tasks. The improvement in extended reasoning capabilities makes it relevant for complex enterprise applications.

title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
title_es: LeRobot: del Hub a hardware robótico con Strands
bajada: Hugging Face y Strands integran LeRobot con la plataforma Hub, permitiendo a developers pasar de modelos de IA a implementación en hardware robótico. Esta integración reduce significativamente la brecha entre investigación y producción en robótica.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and Strands integrate LeRobot with the Hub platform, allowing developers to move from AI models to robotic hardware implementation. This integration significantly reduces the research-to-production gap in robotics.

title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
summary: Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.
title_es: Pramaana Labs asegura $27M para verificación formal en IA
bajada: Khosla Ventures lideró una ronda seed de $27M para Pramaana Labs, que desarrolla técnicas de verificación formal para sistemas de IA. Su enfoque en sectores críticos como derecho y descubrimiento de fármacos aborda un problema de confiabilidad crucial.
bajada_en: Khosla Ventures led a $27M seed round for Pramaana Labs, developing formal verification techniques for AI systems. Its focus on critical sectors like law and drug discovery addresses a crucial reliability problem.

title: HPE AI Factory With NVIDIA Expands for the Era of Agents
summary: Enterprises are moving agentic AI from proof of concept to production — and the next generation of AI factories are built for the era of agents. At HPE Discover Las Vegas, running through Thursday, June 18, NVIDIA and HPE are expanding the HPE AI Factory with NVIDIA, including NVIDIA Vera CPU and NVIDIA Agent Toolkit […]
title_es: HPE AI Factory se expande para era de agentes IA
bajada: NVIDIA y HPE expandieron HPE AI Factory con herramientas optimizadas para agentes de IA en producción. La iniciativa reconoce que las empresas están moviendo agentes IA desde pruebas de concepto a producción real.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and HPE expanded HPE AI Factory with tools optimized for production AI agents. The initiative recognizes enterprises moving agentic AI from proof-of-concept to production.

title: ‘Dangerous’ AI Models Are Coming No Matter What
summary: The US government crackdown on Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 hides a glaring truth: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.
title_es: Modelos de IA peligrosos llegarán sin importar regulación
bajada: Un análisis revela que los intentos de regulación del gobierno estadounidense no detendrán el desarrollo de modelos de IA con capacidades avanzadas de hacking. La conclusión sugiere que la capacidad de explotar vulnerabilidades se normalizará en la próxima generación de modelos.
bajada_en: Analysis reveals US government regulation attempts won't stop development of AI models with advanced hacking capabilities. The conclusion suggests exploitation abilities will become standard in the next generation of models.

title: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting
title_es: MolmoMotion: predicción de movimiento 3D con lenguaje
bajada: Allen AI presenta MolmoMotion, un modelo que integra comprensión de lenguaje natural con predicción de movimiento 3D. Esta convergencia abre aplicaciones en simulación, animación y robótica guiada por comandos de lenguaje.
bajada_en: Allen AI introduces MolmoMotion, a model integrating natural language understanding with 3D motion forecasting. This convergence enables applications in simulation, animation, and language-guided robotics.

title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
summary: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.
title_es: DeepL adquiere Mixhalo para traducción de eventos en vivo
bajada: DeepL adquirió Mixhalo, especialista en transmisión de audio para eventos en vivo, expandiendo sus capacidades a traducción simultánea de eventos. La compañía abrirá una oficina en San Francisco para fortalecer su presencia en EE.UU.
bajada_en: DeepL acquired Mixhalo, specializing in live-event audio streaming, expanding into simultaneous event translation. The company will open a San Francisco office to strengthen its US presence.

title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it.
summary: If physical AI is going to match the accomplishments of LLMs, there's a data problem that needs to be solved.
title_es: XDOF resuelve la recolección de datos para robótica
bajada: Labs de IA están contratando a XDOF para realizar la tediosa pero esencial tarea de recolectar datos de entrenamiento para robots. Este modelo de outsourcing aborda un cuello de botella crítico para el avance de la IA física.
bajada_en: AI labs are hiring XDOF to handle the tedious but essential task of collecting training data for robots. This outsourcing model addresses a critical bottleneck for physical AI advancement.

title: The Gemini-Powered Google Home Speaker Is Finally Here
summary: Arriving six years after Google’s last smart speaker, the new HomePod-style device was redesigned to play host to Gemini’s chatbot.
title_es: Google lanza nuevo altavoz Home con Gemini tras 6 años
bajada: Google presentó su primer altavoz inteligente nuevo en seis años, basado en Gemini. El dispositivo representa el primer producto de hardware que integra completamente los avances recientes de Google en IA conversacional.
bajada_en: Google launched its first new smart speaker in six years, powered by Gemini. The device represents the first hardware product fully integrating Google's recent advances in conversational AI.

title: The next humanoid robot might not look human at all
summary: The next humanoid robot might not have a head. It might not have legs. It might even sit on a wheeled base and fold down like a deck chair. But, as Genesis AI puts it, "humanoid robots don't need to look human." That explains the look of Eno, the new robot from the French startup […]
title_es: Genesis AI desafía diseño de robots humanoides
bajada: Genesis AI presenta Eno, un robot que cuestiona la necesidad de que los robots humanoides parezcan humanos. El enfoque funcional sobre la forma estética podría acelerar la adopción de robots en aplicaciones prácticas.
bajada_en: Genesis AI introduces Eno, a robot questioning the need for humanoid robots to look human. The functional-over-form approach could accelerate robot adoption in practical applications.

title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
summary: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.
title_es: Fondo de pensiones canadiense invierte en data centers de India
bajada: Un fondo de pensiones canadiense adquirió una participación del 8.2% en CtrlS, operador de más de 15 data centers en India. La inversión refleja el auge de la demanda de infraestructura de IA en mercados emergentes.
bajada_en: A Canadian pension fund acquired an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, operating 15+ data centers across India. The investment reflects surging AI infrastructure demand in emerging markets.

title: Google’s first smart speaker in six years arrives next week
summary: Google's first new smart speaker in six years starts shipping on June 25th, narrowly missing its promised spring launch window. Preorders for the Google Home Speaker open today, June 17th. Nothing has changed hardware-wise in the nine months since the $99 speaker was announced. It has the same slightly squished round design, with touch-capacitive buttons […]
title_es: Google Home Speaker comienza envíos el 25 de junio
bajada: El nuevo altavoz de Google comenzará a enviarse el 25 de junio tras meses de retraso respecto a la promesa de primavera. Los preórdenes se abrieron el 17 de junio con un precio de $99.
bajada_en: Google's new speaker begins shipping June 25th after missing its spring launch window. Pre-orders opened June 17th at a $99 price point.
